title: The Road to Sabaody: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then that was your shirt's fate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you know how strong I am?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll take care of you right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're that disagreed marine officer Drake, huh...?
